title: ARCHIVED – Operational bulletins 2006 - Canada.ca

## ARCHIVED – Operational bulletins 2006

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 022 – August 2, 2006 (Expired) Assessing declared residence
- OB 021 – June 22, 2006 (Expired) Interim Instructions to CIC officers concerning the examination of H&C applications (in Canada)
- OB 020 – March 28, 2006 (Expired) Amendment to Section 11 of the Citizenship Act
